items.title: Investigate Dream degradation: RunTimeout clamped to 6h hard max
items.description: Dream degraded overnight. The morning handoff should produce a tracked repair packet instead of silently carrying the failure forward.
items.why_now: Dream degraded overnight. The morning handoff should produce a tracked repair packet instead of silently carrying the failure forward.
items.morning_command: ao rpi phased "Investigate Dream degradation: RunTimeout clamped to 6h hard max"

items.title: Implement ao outcomes run per docs/contracts/ao-outcomes.md
items.description: Implement cli/cmd/ao/outcomes.go + cli/internal/outcomes/{rubric,runner,grader}.go + L1/L2 tests. Spec is complete; SPEC wave can be skipped, TEST wave generates failing tests against named functions in spec, GREEN wave makes them pass.

items.title: Implement worker-spec consumption in crank and swarm per schemas/worker-spec.v1.schema.json
items.description: Modify cli/cmd/ao/crank.go and cli/cmd/ao/swarm.go to consume worker_spec at spawn (load YAML/JSON, validate, build spawn payload using only declared tools, prepend prompt template). Schema and operator doc already shipped.

items.title: Move skills/forge/SKILL.md content to references/ to fit 248-line CI limit
items.description: skills/forge/SKILL.md is 260 lines (was 258 before this epic added 2-line analog quote). CI lint enforces 248. Mechanical fix: move Quality Pool, Examples, or Manual Execution sections to skills/forge/references/.

consumed_by: soc-yjzp post-mortem 2026-05-06 (yjzp.6 wontfix, yjzp.8 spec-shipped/impl-deferred, pul8 filed); items absorbed into soc-sx99 epic context
